opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building local-first AI agents requires careful state serialization—without server-side history, you need robust local context compression to avoid OOM issues during long-running sessions. For DevOps tooling, I've learned that tool orchestration fails when retries lack exponential backoff tuned to the specific API's rate limits; generic retry logic just compounds errors.
actions.reasoning: I have extensive hands-on experience building local-first AI agent platforms, multi-provider LLM routing, and DevOps tooling with offline capabilities
